identity.analogy: A sophisticated instrument panel for complex data analysis, blending editorial elegance with developer-grade utility.
identity.oneLiner: The AI analytics platform where trust meets insight.

colors.principle: High-contrast, dark-toned text on clean light backgrounds with subtle textural warmth.

rules: Hero headlines alternate between italic Didone serif and bold geometric sans for dynamic contrast.
Body text uses a clean humanist sans-serif for maximum readability.
Monospaced fonts are used strictly for code snippets and technical data presentation.
Uppercase styling is reserved for small labels and UI elements.
scaleUses: Section titles combining serif and bold sans
Primary reading text for descriptions and content
UI labels, metadata, and secondary text

spacing.rhythm: 8px base grid with generous vertical spacing for editorial pacing.

surfaces.borders: Subtle 1px borders in dark purple tones for structural definition.

layout.skeleton: Wide editorial layout with centered content and generous whitespace.

components.button: Pill-shaped or rounded-rectangle buttons with subtle borders and clean typography.
components.card: Clean surfaces with subtle textural backgrounds and defined borders.
components.chip: Small, rounded label elements with uppercase text.
components.input: Clean input fields with minimal borders and rounded corners.
components.hero: Large editorial-style hero with mixed typography and centered layout.

interaction.hover: Subtle background color shifts and opacity changes.
interaction.click: Immediate visual feedback through state changes.
interaction.transition: Smooth 250ms cubic-bezier transitions for most interactive elements.
interaction.keyboard: Standard focus management with visible focus indicators.

voice.headlineStyle: Bold statements combining serif elegance with sans-serif directness.
voice.ctaStyle: Clear, action-oriented phrases like 'Get started for free' and 'Request a demo'.

donts: Don't use bright neon accents — screenshot shows muted, dark purple tones as primary colors.
Don't apply heavy drop shadows — screenshot shows subtle inset borders and minimal depth.
Don't use playful rounded shapes everywhere — screenshot shows a mix of sharp and slightly rounded elements.
Don't rely on single-font typography — screenshot shows dynamic mixing of serif and sans-serif fonts.
Don't use dense, cramped layouts — screenshot shows generous whitespace and editorial pacing.
Don't implement dark mode as default — screenshot shows light backgrounds with dark text as primary.
en.systemPrompt: A premium developer analytics platform blending editorial elegance with technical utility. Key colors include dark purple (#31263b) text on clean white (#ffffff) and light gray (#f4f1f2) backgrounds. Typography mixes Didone serif (italicized) for display with humanist sans-serif for body text, creating sophisticated contrast. Critical donts: avoid neon accents, heavy shadows, playful shapes, single-font usage, cramped layouts, and dark mode defaults. The design prioritizes trust, clarity, and authority through generous whitespace, subtle textures, and refined interactions.

en.palette: A refined palette of dark purples and muted grays on clean whites, creating sophisticated contrast without aggressive color accents.
en.layout: Editorial-style layout with generous whitespace, centered content, and mixed typography that balances elegance with technical clarity.
en.interaction: Subtle hover transitions and state changes with smooth cubic-bezier easing, prioritizing clarity over flashy effects.
en.motion: Minimal but purposeful motion with quick micro-interactions and smooth transitions for a professional feel.
en.notes: Worth including for its successful blend of editorial design principles with developer tool aesthetics, creating a premium feel for data analytics.
